website.siteDescription: We source and roast specialty coffee beans from mountain farms around the world.

item.title: The Art of Pour Over Coffee
item.body:
Why Pour Over?

Pour over coffee is one of the best ways to experience single-origin beans. The method gives you complete control over extraction time and water temperature.

At Mountain Coffee Roasters, we recommend starting with a 1:16 ratio of coffee to water.

Step-by-Step Guide

First, heat your water to 205°F. Then, place your filter in the dripper and rinse it with hot water.

Add your ground coffee — we suggest a medium-fine grind, similar to table salt.
item.excerpt: A complete guide to making the perfect pour over coffee at home.
